message:
fix(freeze): free ArrayBuffer reference to prevent GC leak

JS_GetTypedArrayBuffer returns a duplicated JSValue that must be freed.
Added JSValue.free(ctx, buffer) in all exit paths of PATH 1:
- After successful native call before return
- When buf_ptr is null
- In else branch when TypedArray check fails

This fixes the GC assertion "list_empty(&rt->gc_obj_list)" at runtime exit.
